title: ShippingBin PHC2Crops Compat
description: Compatibility between mods Shipping Bin & Pam's Harvestcraft 2 Crops
body:
Basically, now you can sell crops from Pam's Harvestcraft 2 Crops mod using the shipping bin from the Shipping Bin mod.

Shipping Bin Mod: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shipping-bin](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shipping-bin)

Pam's Harvestcraft 2 Crops Mod: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-crops](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-crops)
